text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon comes up to me while I'm
walking down the hallway. It seems she's still
fretting over the upcoming party...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to make a cyborg costume, but there
is insufficient time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I worry it won't be ready for the party at my
current pace.
choice_data_list: Why don't you think of a different costume?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Something different? ...Indeed, that would be a
wise course of action, given the time remaining.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A costume that can be made quickly, doesn't
require changing one's expression, and is within
my performance capabilities...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will search using these criteria. Commencing
mission.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
An animal that has the same expression at all
times? Hm... How about a shoebill?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I read in an encyclopedia that, while shoebills do
have different expressions, they don't move very
much, so it's hard to make them out.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! There's a fantasy novel that has a
talking shoebill in it, and—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry. I almost started rambling there...
It's a bad habit of mine.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I appreciate your help. Preparing to
input data on shoebills. Could you tell me where
this encyclopedia is located?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Retrieving information on shoebills from memory. The World's Most Peculiar Animals, page 36, figure 1.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Reproduction complete. What do you think? I
would like your honest opinion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I point out that even if Mihono Bourbon's
expression doesn't change, it doesn't mean she
has to keep her entire body still.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your response is logical. I predict that remaining
perfectly still at the party will dampen the mood
even more.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Removing shoebill costume from potential
candidates. Resuming search for an appropriate
costume.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya talkin' about? This isn't some kinda
puzzle ya gotta solve. You just gotta enjoy
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it's not like you're gonna find anything
lookin' round here. Actually... what about that
over there?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But a carrot is very similar to a shoebill... Strictly
speaking, a carrot moves even less than a
shoebill.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Then why don't ya go as a leaf or somethin'?
Y'know, just sway in the breeze.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I see. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Uhhh, you waitin' for me to say somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon continues her search for
costume inspiration.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Costume candidates in school have been
exhausted. Locating potential costumes is
proving difficult.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Earlier, Creek said I would be perfectly fine as I
am. That even if I wore a costume, I should be
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But any attempt to imitate something will mean I
am not being "as I am."
choice_data_list:
Isn't there anything you'd like to be? You don't
have to overthink it.

Isn't there anything you'd like to be? You don't
have to overthink it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Something I'd like to be... A star fighter zooming
through the cosmos, perhaps.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, that would be more difficult to implement
than a cyborg. As far as alternatives...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A fast and strong Umamusume. That is all that
comes to mind at present.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I really am a boring person.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'll think it over a little more... I must complete
the mission I have been assigned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon sets off walking with her head
held high as if to psych herself up. It looks like
she's not ready to give up yet.
